title: Cleanup
description: Cleans strings by normalizing quotes, punctuation, etc. ready for further processing. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

normalizeQuotes.title: Normalize quotation marks
normalizeQuotes.description: Replace all quotation marks with straight double quotes and apostrophes with single straight quotes.

checkCharacters.title: Check for corrupt or unexpected characters
checkCharacters.description: Detect and remove text units containing common corrupt character strings.

matchRegexExpressions.title: Mark segments matching default regular expressions for removal
matchRegexExpressions.description: Mark segments matching built-in regular expressions for removal. This option is not currently used.

matchUserRegex.title: Mark segments matching user defined regular expressions for removal
matchUserRegex.description: Remove text units containing text that matches user-defined regular expressions.

userRegex.title: User Defined Regex
userRegex.description: Custom regular expression pattern for matching segments to mark for removal.

pruneTextUnit.title: Remove unnecessary segments from text unit
pruneTextUnit.description: Remove text units marked for removal or that have no target text.

normalizePunctuations.title: Standardize spaces before and after certain punctuation marks to English writing style.
normalizePunctuations.description: Standardize spaces around punctuation marks to English writing style conventions.

keepCrNlIntact.title: Keep CR and NL characters intact. They are not normalized to an ASCII space with spaces and tabs.
keepCrNlIntact.description: Preserve CR and NL characters instead of normalizing them to spaces.
